title: Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights: Surging Profits
text: Riot Platforms demonstrated substantial growth in its Q1 2024 results. The company generated $79.3 million in total revenue, representing an 18% year-over-year increase. More impressively, net income surged to $211.8 million compared to just $18.5 million in the prior year period, while earnings per share reached $0.82. The company's Bitcoin holdings strengthened significantly, ending the quarter with 8,490 bitcoins versus 7,094 at the same time last year. However, actual bitcoin production declined 36% year-over-year to 1,364 units, primarily due to increased network difficulty. Mining costs per bitcoin rose to $23,034, driven by network challenges and operational expenses. Riot Platforms Inc achieved a significant increase in total revenue, reporting $79.3 million for Q1 2024, up 18% year over year. The company successfully activated its Corsicana facility and maintained a clear and fully funded growth plan targeting 31 exahash capacity by year-end 2024. The engineering segment contracted sharply, with revenue falling to $4.7 million from $16.1 million due to global supply chain constraints. Additionally, the company faced rising legal expenses from disputes over terminated data center hosting contracts.
